aeo_readiness.summary: While the website has strong foundational elements, it lacks conversational content and AI-specific optimizations to ensure visibility in AI-driven search results.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight common customer queries.
Create content that answers HVAC and plumbing questions conversationally.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a 5-star rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any discrepancies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: Missing HowTo schema for common HVAC/plumbing tasks.
FAQPage schema could be expanded to cover more customer questions.
LocalBusiness schema is present but could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions.

ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency HVAC services near me' or 'how to fix a leaky faucet'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Incorporate FAQ schema and create blog posts answering common HVAC/plumbing questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position the company as a local HVAC/plumbing expert by publishing detailed guides and tutorials.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for the new search landscape.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI-assisted searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks conversational content and FAQ schema, making it less likely to be cited by AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach focuses on creating AI-friendly, conversational content and enhancing schema markup to boost visibility in AI-driven search results.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; waiting means losing ground and potential customers.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Warm Welcome Heating & Cooling
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility in AI-driven search results.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for the AI search landscape.
page_title: Trusted HVAC & Plumbing Services | Warm Welcome Heating, Cooling, & Plumbing
